_README: This is an EXAMPLE template. Replace it with your real ComfyUI workflow exported in API format.
How to create the real template:
2. Build your Qwen3-TTS workflow in the UI
3. Click Save -> Save (API Format) -> download the JSON
4. In the downloaded JSON, find the input fields for text, voice, instruct, output filename
{{VOICE_ID}}        - Voice preset: narrator_calm, male_young, female_warm, etc.
{{INSTRUCT}}        - Style/mood instruct prompt (auto-mapped from chunk mood)
Mood -> instruct mapping (applied automatically by synthesize_comfyui.py):

1._comment: Replace the string values below with placeholder tokens

2._comment: The SaveAudio node saves output; set filename_prefix to {{OUTPUT_FILENAME}}
